name: Twice Baked Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes clean.
2. Bake in a 400°F oven until done (45 to 60 minutes).
3. Cut off a slice from the top of each potato, then scoop out the insides.
4. Mash the scooped-out potato mixture.
5. Whip in milk or cream and butter, seasoning with salt and pepper.
6. Refill the potato shells with the mashed filling.
7. Chill the potatoes, then freeze them on a cookie sheet.
8. Once frozen, seal the potatoes in plastic freezer bags.
9. To serve, thaw the potatoes in the refrigerator or microwave.
- Alternatively, thaw them in a moderate oven (350°F) for 30 minutes, then brown for the last few minutes at 400°F.
